name: FastGPT
description: Open-source enterprise AI agent builder by Labring with RAG, workflow orchestration and OpenAI-compatible APIs.

seo.title: FastGPT — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: FastGPT: Open-source enterprise AI agent builder by Labring with RAG, workflow orchestration and OpenAI-compatible APIs.

when_to_use: Building knowledge base chatbots with file upload and RAG
Deploying team-facing QA bots connected to internal documents
Creating multi-flow LLM workflows with a visual node editor
Self-hosting an open-source RAG platform for data privacy

pros: RAG plus workflow orchestration out of box
review.verdict: Worth comparing to Dify when you want a self-hosted RAG agent stack.
review.best_for: Teams self-hosting an OSS agent platform with RAG built in
review.not_for: Teams happy with hosted agent builders like Coze or OpenAI Assistants

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
